title: poa strictiramea
intro: Poa strictiramea, also known as New Zealand hair grass, is a type of grass native to New Zealand and Australia, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa strictiramea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Poa strictiramea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
